title: Saint-Brieuc Armor Agglomération
summary: Saint-Brieuc Armor Agglomération (Breton: Bodadeg armoù Sant-Brieg) is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the city of Saint-Brieuc. It is located in the Côtes-d'Armor department, in the Brittany region, western France. It was created in January 2017. Its seat is in Saint-Brieuc. Its area is 600.7 km2 (231.9 sq mi). Its population was 151,733 in 2017, of which 44,372 in Saint-Brieuc proper.
text:
Saint-Brieuc Armor Agglomération (Breton: Bodadeg armoù Sant-Brieg) is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the city of Saint-Brieuc. It is located in the Côtes-d'Armor department, in the Brittany region, western France. It was created in January 2017. Its seat is in Saint-Brieuc. Its area is 600.7 km2 (231.9 sq mi). Its population was 151,733 in 2017, of which 44,372 in Saint-Brieuc proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 32 communes:
